compliance.assurance_rationale: TSA SD02C III.A Cybersecurity plan — physical badge audit is one of the plan components when control rooms are in scope.
API RP 1164 3rd edition 5.3 Access control — pipeline-facility physical access-control audit is a named control in the recommended practice.
NERC CIP-005-7 R1 Electronic security perimeter — physical badge audit supports the Physical Security Perimeter requirement adjacent to the ESP.
